title: pelargonium erlangerianum
intro: Pelargonium erlangerianum, also known as the Rose Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, anxiety, and insomnia, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium erlangerianum include teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to the skin for its therapeutic benefits.
